nasb.text: They shall also keep all the furnishings of the tent of meeting, along with the duties of the sons of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle.

esv.text: They shall guard all the furnishings of the tent of meeting, and keep guard over the people of Israel as they minister at the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 他們又要看守管理會幕裡的一切器具，也要替以色列人盡上本分，辦理帳幕的事。

ccb.text: 也要负责看守会幕里面的器具，为以色列人办理圣幕的事务。
